description.content: PUBLIC - Create user + return token | Pre-request: unique email generated ({{userEmail}})
PROTECTED - Get authenticated user profile | Auth: Bearer {{token}}
PROTECTED - Update name and email | Auth: Bearer {{token}}
Step 3 collection aligned with Sanctum bearer auth and current API contracts.
